Post Comment
Planning to camp on TLP, any tips?
QuoteReply
# Jul 18 2023 at 6:12 AM Rating: Decent
malcolmlo
3 posts
I would be solo, likely camping on a druid. So less crowded area is preferred, until I get to max level for the xpansion

Questions:

1. Is there differences in drop rate between FM bodyguard and Droga bodyguard?
2. Is FM or Droga BG easier camp for solo 55-60?
3. Any other advice for this camp?

As I am on TLP I will be within the expansion's level range (max 60) so i can't just steamroll all the mobs and have to be careful.
▲ Page top
a goblin bodyguard
QuoteReply
# Jul 03 2022 at 3:20 PM Rating: Excellent
Nniki
Guru
297 posts
The pre-nerf version drops from a goblin bodyguard in both Frontier Mountains and Temple of Droga 1.0 on TLP servers during the time period it's available.

The bodyguard has various spawn points in the ledge room in Droga, not just in the room with the Chief.
▲ Page top

QuoteReply
# Nov 05 2019 at 7:30 AM Rating: Decent
Monsieur Ebelch
View User Forum
626 posts
I have been camping Marcia pretty faithfully for eight months, and I have yet to see the item for sale even once.

Update: Marcia did finally drop the circlet (shortly after I posted the original message).

# Jul 11 2010 at 10:44 AM Rating: Decent
-REDACTED-
Scholar
24 posts
it might be pre/nerf but the circlet of shadows is actually the same stats now tell me why one sells for 6 figures and the other sells for cheap
▲ Page top
circlet of shadow
QuoteReply
# Oct 01 2011 at 2:57 AM Rating: Good
nazmin
1 post
There are many things insta cast invis can do for you and that is why this item is so expensive.

1. Cast while running
2. Cast after FD to lose aggro
3. If your a good puller with this item you can single pull just about anything adn its goes something like this:

a. darkness one mob and send a pet at the other mob/s
b. FD when the non-snared mobs get to you
c. the snared mob stays still while the others go back to the spawn point
d. becaues they kill your pet then came to you the snared mob is not out of range
e. now come out of FD and hit this beautiful Item (hotkey both sit and item)
f. now that you lost aggro to both and the snared mob is out of range.. pull it

Nazec 68 SK with item. I sold the one i had in the back for cropse runs for 300k a few years back. what a mistake.






▲ Page top
circlet of shadow
QuoteReply
# Jul 13 2010 at 6:02 PM Rating: Good
Hamfiend
Sage
113 posts
It would be because of the instant cast time. You can click it while running. I have one on my SK. I love it.
